description: A safety-video analysis co-worker for reviewing local workplace footage. Put video files in the input folder; it stages them for the visual analysis node, identifies safety-relevant observations, and writes a structured safety report and supporting artifacts to the output folder.
name: Safety Video Analyser

product.agent_role: Video understanding and safety report team that validates smart node allocation across a desktop cluster.
product.benefit: Confirms large local videos can move by BlobRef to the model node while report generation can prefer a lighter local node.
product.customizable_for: Workplace safety review, video QA, facility operations, and cluster placement validation.
product.how_it_works: Stages local videos from the selected folder, schedules the VLM worker on a high-end NVIDIA node, routes structured video metadata to a report worker, and records a Markdown report.
product.output: Safety video metadata and Markdown report with placement/model routing evidence.
product.problem: Large video inputs should not travel through gRPC, and model-heavy agents should run near the right hardware while lighter agents can prefer weaker nodes.
product.simulation_type: Two-agent cross-node video analysis placement smoke test.
product.target_users: OtterDesk operators, cluster runtime developers, and safety operations teams.

description: A video-watch co-worker for monitoring an approved local or mapped video stream. Give it the stream source, visual targets, alert policy, and optional input folder assets; it detects configured objects or activities and writes reviewable observations, counts, positions, confidence, and alert status artifacts to the output folder.
name: Video Watch Assistant

product.agent_role: AI assistant for reviewing video stream activity and preparing visual detection alerts.
product.benefit: Helps reviewers notice configured visual targets faster while keeping the final access or safety decision with people.
product.customizable_for: Video monitoring, configurable visual detection, facility operations, and site safety workflows.
product.how_it_works: Samples the approved video stream, asks a vision model whether configured targets are visible, records observable detection details, applies cooldown policy, and prepares reviewable alerts.
product.input: Approved video stream, target prompt, alert thresholds, and notification settings.
product.output: Visual detection observations with count, label, category, color, position, activity, confidence, and alert status.
product.problem: Continuous video is hard to review manually; teams need a helpful assistant that flags likely configured visual targets with plain-language details.
product.simulation_type: Video stream sampling with visual detection review state.
product.target_users: Video operators, security reviewers, safety operations teams, and site-access coordinators.

description: A voice customer-service co-worker for a small business demo. Give it the business name, service scope, opening message, escalation rules, editable knowledge text, and optional sample/input folder; it starts a local WebRTC voice experience and writes service status, conversation logs, knowledge snapshots, and handoff-ready run artifacts to the output folder.
name: Pizza Order Voice AI Co-worker

product.agent_role: Pizza-ordering voice co-worker that answers from editable menu knowledge, helps collect an order, asks clarifying questions, and recommends human handoff when it is unsure or outside scope.
product.benefit: Lets an operator launch a local OtterDesk run, update plain-text pizza menu knowledge, and hand callers a localhost HTTPS voice link backed by the Spark NVIDIA stack.
product.customizable_for: Pizza shops, takeout counters, small restaurants, delivery intake, and friendly food-ordering demos.
product.how_it_works: Pre-launch prepares Spark and the shared NVIDIA stack, opens a localhost tunnel to the Spark voice service, and each turn retrieves relevant snippets from editable plain-text menu knowledge before answering.
product.input: Shop name, service scope, opening message, editable menu knowledge text, escalation policy, voice, Spark host, Spark HTTPS port, and local proxy port.
product.output: Localhost voice URL, service health, editable menu knowledge snapshot, conversation log, events, and final run artifact.
product.problem: Pizza shops need a friendly voice co-worker that can help callers place basic orders from editable menu knowledge while handing sensitive or uncertain calls to people.
product.simulation_type: Spark-hosted real-time WebRTC pizza-ordering conversation exposed through localhost with editable text RAG.
product.target_users: Restaurant operators, pizza shops, customer operations leads, small businesses, and AI operations teams.

description: A go-to-market co-worker that helps research accounts and prepare outreach. Give it a CRM/input folder, optional initial customer list, and test email settings; it maintains local CRM and market-insight CSVs, drafts personalized outreach, tracks responses, recommends follow-up steps, and writes run artifacts to the output folder.
name: GTM AI Workflow

product.agent_role: Account researcher, pain hypothesis analyst, sales email drafter, response summarizer, CRM updater, and product-marketing feedback assistant.
product.benefit: Turns target-account signals and outreach responses into a continuously updated local CRM and sharper product and marketing insight.
product.customizable_for: Account-based outbound, founder-led sales, RevOps CRM hygiene, product marketing feedback loops, and sales-assist workflows.
product.how_it_works: Starts from an optional target account list, researches accounts, identifies likely pain, prepares personalized outreach, tracks replies, summarizes responses, updates crm.csv and market_insights.csv, and recommends the next GTM action.
product.input: Optional initial customer or target-account list, local CRM CSV output folder, and optional internal test-mode email recipient.
product.output: Personalized outreach drafts, delivery and reply events, crm.csv, market_insights.csv, response summaries, and recommended next actions.
product.problem: GTM teams need a learning loop from target-account signal to outreach, response, CRM state, product insight, and sharper positioning.
product.simulation_type: Long-running GTM learning loop with account research, outreach, inbox monitoring, CRM CSV updates, and product-marketing feedback.
product.target_users: Growth, sales, RevOps, product marketing, and founder-led GTM teams.

description: A portfolio risk co-worker for review-only market and scenario analysis. Give it holdings, benchmark weights, risk limits, decision constraints, optional market notes, and an input folder for supporting files; it pulls public market context, runs risk and simulation math, benchmarks possible actions, and writes risk summaries and review reports to the output folder.
name: Portfolio Risk Review Assistant

product.agent_role: LLM report writer that summarizes supplied market signals and structured simulation evidence; deterministic finance workers propose, simulate, evaluate, and benchmark decisions.
product.benefit: Helps portfolio teams evaluate risk actions with traceable simulations before any human-approved downstream action.
product.customizable_for: Wealth management, treasury review, family offices, robo-advisory risk workflows, portfolio monitoring, and review-only advisor workbenches.
product.how_it_works: Fetches public market data, computes risk features, proposes review-only candidate actions, simulates and benchmarks each decision, then uses an LLM only to interpret supplied signals and write the final report.
product.input: Portfolio holdings, risk policy, decision constraints, optional market signals, and optional benchmark weights.
product.output: Review-only risk report with ranked simulated decisions, benchmark comparison, policy violations, and market data source references.
product.problem: Portfolio teams need reviewable real-time risk advice that separates deterministic financial engineering from LLM narrative generation.
product.simulation_type: Real-time public-market portfolio risk review with Monte Carlo decision benchmarking.
product.target_users: Investors, advisors, portfolio managers, treasury teams, and fintech operators.

description: A property deal research co-worker for comparing real-estate opportunities. Give it a target ZIP code, price ceiling, deal history, memory policy, optional broker notes, financing constraints, and an input folder for supporting files; it researches and scores opportunities, explains tradeoffs, and writes ranked review artifacts to the output folder.
name: Property Deal Research Assistant

product.agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
product.benefit: Helps acquisition teams surface stronger property opportunities while keeping investment decisions reviewable.
product.customizable_for: Rental acquisitions, flipping pipelines, multifamily sourcing, market expansion, diligence review, and capital-allocation meetings.
product.how_it_works: Retrieves relevant deal and ZIP-code history, scores opportunities, and drafts a clear recommendation with supporting context.
product.input: Property pipeline data, ZIP-code history, broker notes, financing constraints, and prior investment decisions.
product.output: Ranked property opportunities, source-grounded notes, and watchlist or bid recommendations for review.
product.problem: Property deal review depends on older broker, lender, rent, insurance, and diligence details that are easy to lose in noisy pipelines.
product.simulation_type: Property opportunity research with deal-memory retrieval.
product.target_users: Real-estate investors, acquisition analysts, property-tech teams, and diligence operators.

description: A VC analysis co-worker for early startup screening reports. Put pitch decks, memos, financial snippets, company folders, or other startup documents in the input folder; it groups documents by company, performs privacy-safe public research, applies seven VC heuristic scoring methods, audits the math and evidence, and writes score-only per-company reports and batch indexes to the output folder.
name: VC Assistant

product.agent_role: VC analysis coworker that prepares source-grounded score reports without issuing investment decisions.
product.benefit: Turns mixed startup document packets into organized per-company heuristic reports, method-score files, research ledgers, and batch coverage summaries so the user can decide what deserves deeper diligence.
product.customizable_for: Pre-seed screening, accelerator batches, angel deal flow, founder note review, and early diligence packet triage.
product.how_it_works: Monitors a local folder, groups documents by company, extracts source evidence, normalizes deterministic fact tables, runs staged browser research, applies seven specialist numerical scorers in parallel, audits score consistency, and writes per-company and batch-level reports.
product.input: Local folder with one or more startup document packets, preferably grouped by first-level company folders.
product.output: Per-company analysis folders with scores, evidence, assumptions, public source refs, and missing-evidence flags.
product.problem: Early startup review is noisy; analysts need a quick score-only report across common VC heuristics without fake precision or automated decisions.
runtime_features: Crunchbase and public profile verification planning
product.simulation_type: Folder-monitoring startup packet review with score-only VC heuristic reports.
product.target_users: VC analysts, angel investors, accelerator reviewers, startup scouts, and founder-led investment teams.

description: A personal tax preparation co-worker for draft review packets. Put W-2s, 1099s, brokerage statements, receipts, and other tax documents in the input folder; it extracts tax evidence, prepares draft Form 1040 workpapers, runs specialist and manager reviews, and writes JSON, Markdown, and PDF review outputs to the output folder for human review before filing.
name: Personal Income Tax Expert

product.agent_role: Personal tax preparation team that prepares a source-grounded draft Form 1040 review packet while asking careful review questions.
product.benefit: Turns a folder of tax forms into a clear draft packet and review checklist before the user opens filing software or talks to a preparer.
product.customizable_for: Personal federal tax preparation, 401(k) and retirement distribution review, interest income intake, brokerage statements, mortgage interest review, and tax document checklists.
product.how_it_works: Classifies tax PDFs, extracts embedded text or marks OCR needs, sends redacted evidence through specialist LLM preparer stages, maps supported facts to likely Form 1040 lines, audits schedule risks, and writes JSON, Markdown, and PDF review artifacts.
product.input: Local folder with tax PDFs such as W-2, 1099-INT, 1099-R or 401(k), 1099-DIV, 1098, 1095-A, and brokerage statements.
product.output: Prepared draft Form 1040 review packet with source evidence, specialist workpapers, audit and manager review, advisor-style next steps, Markdown, and PDF outputs.
product.problem: Tax source documents arrive as scattered PDFs; users need a private workflow that turns W-2, 1099-INT, 1099-R, and related forms into a reviewable Form 1040 draft packet with preparer workpapers and manager review.
runtime_features: tax auditor and manager review gates
product.simulation_type: Document automation tax preparation workflow with a specialist LLM preparer team, auditor, and manager review.
product.target_users: Individual taxpayers, household finance operators, bookkeepers, and tax preparers.

description: A research co-worker for early drug-discovery triage. Give it a disease or target profile, screening criteria, optional candidate seeds, literature notes, and an input folder for supporting files; it stages an evidence-backed discovery workflow and writes review-ready candidate summaries, scores, assumptions, risks, and source notes to the output folder.
name: Drug Discovery Research Assistant

product.agent_role: AI assistant for organizing drug discovery candidate generation, filtering, and evidence review.
product.benefit: Helps research teams keep candidate discovery organized across repeated generate, score, extract, and review stages.
product.customizable_for: Drug discovery, material search, assay planning, scientific literature review, and research pipeline support.
product.how_it_works: Coordinates staged research tasks that generate candidates, evaluate evidence, extract artifacts, and summarize progress for review.
product.input: Target profile, assay or screening criteria, scientific constraints, and optional literature or candidate seeds.
product.output: Candidate artifacts, stage logs, evidence notes, and discovery summaries for researcher review.
product.problem: Discovery work is iterative and evidence-heavy; researchers need an assistant that keeps candidate generation, scoring, extraction, and review moving in order.
product.simulation_type: Iterative scientific research workflow with staged candidate review.
product.target_users: Computational biology researchers, scientific AI platform teams, and research operations groups.

description: An invoice and bill extraction co-worker for accounts-payable review. Put invoice, bill, or utility PDF/JSON files in the input folder; it OCRs and extracts supplier, customer, invoice ID, tax, due date, total, line item, billing period, and consumption fields, then writes a review-only extraction packet and source-grounded report to the output folder.
name: Invoice Bill Extraction Assistant

product.agent_role: Local invoice OCR and field extraction team that prepares source-grounded payable review packets.
product.benefit: Turns sensitive document folders into source-grounded review packets while keeping OCR and extraction local.
product.customizable_for: Accounts payable, utility bill intake, ERP invoice routing, vendor onboarding, spend analytics, and BPO document queues.
product.how_it_works: Stages a local document folder, extracts embedded text, uses shared local LLM OCR when needed, extracts structured fields, validates against labels when available, and writes a human-review packet.
product.input: PDF electricity invoices with JSON labels
product.output: Review-only invoice_bill_extraction_packet with evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.
product.problem: AP, ERP, BPO, and utility billing teams need private extraction of supplier pricing, tax identifiers, customer data, bank details, and spending patterns from high-volume invoice and bill PDFs.
product.simulation_type: Document automation workflow with local OCR and review-gated structured extraction.
product.target_users: Enterprises, AP teams, BPOs, ERP vendors, and energy or utility billing processors.

description: A contract review co-worker for clause intake and attorney review. Put contracts, text exports, playbook notes, or clause annotations in the input folder; it extracts key clauses, maps them to the configured taxonomy, compares them with the playbook, flags issues and evidence gaps, and writes a source-grounded review packet to the output folder.
name: Legal Contract Clause Review Assistant

product.agent_role: Local contract review team that extracts clause evidence and keeps legal conclusions review-only.
product.benefit: Turns sensitive document folders into source-grounded review packets while keeping OCR and extraction local.
product.customizable_for: M&A diligence, commercial contract review, CLM intake, renewal review, assignment and change-of-control checks, and playbook comparison.
product.how_it_works: Stages a local document folder, extracts embedded text, uses shared local LLM OCR when needed, extracts structured fields, validates against labels when available, and writes a human-review packet.
product.input: Commercial contract PDFs, TXT, CSV, JSON, and clause annotations
product.output: Review-only contract_clause_review_packet with evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.
product.problem: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, and diligence teams need private extraction of privileged or deal-sensitive contract terms without uploading client agreements to external services.
product.simulation_type: Document automation workflow with local OCR and review-gated structured extraction.
product.target_users: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, M&A diligence teams, and contract operations groups.

description: A medical de-identification co-worker for privacy review. Put clinical-style PDFs, labels, or bounding-box files in the input folder; it detects PHI/PII, extracts record fields, notes redaction risks, and writes a review-gated de-identification packet with evidence and warnings to the output folder.
name: Medical De-Identification Record Intake Assistant

product.agent_role: Local medical document OCR and de-identification team that prepares redaction evidence for human privacy review.
product.benefit: Turns sensitive document folders into source-grounded review packets while keeping OCR and extraction local.
product.customizable_for: Patient-record intake, clinical PDF redaction, medical BPO queues, research chart abstraction, and HIPAA-constrained document preprocessing.
product.how_it_works: Stages a local document folder, extracts embedded text, uses shared local LLM OCR when needed, extracts structured fields, validates against labels when available, and writes a human-review packet.
product.input: Synthetic medical PDFs with ground truth and bounding boxes
product.output: Review-only medical_deidentification_review_packet with evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.
product.problem: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical BPOs need local OCR and de-identification of PHI-bearing records before downstream use.
product.simulation_type: Document automation workflow with local OCR and review-gated structured extraction.
product.target_users: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical document operations teams.

description: A tax-form OCR co-worker for structured intake review. Put tax form images, PDFs, answer files, or field-context tables in the input folder; it classifies forms, locates fields, captures taxpayer and line-item values, validates totals, and writes a review-only tax capture packet to the output folder.
name: Tax Form OCR Capture Assistant

product.agent_role: Local tax form OCR and structured capture team that prepares reviewable field maps without filing or advice claims.
product.benefit: Turns sensitive document folders into source-grounded review packets while keeping OCR and extraction local.
product.customizable_for: Tax form classification, field location, OCR benchmarking, payroll form intake, bank tax packet review, and government form capture.
product.how_it_works: Stages a local document folder, extracts embedded text, uses shared local LLM OCR when needed, extracts structured fields, validates against labels when available, and writes a human-review packet.
product.input: Synthesized IRS tax-form images with field-answer files
product.output: Review-only tax_form_ocr_capture_packet with evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.
product.problem: CPA firms, tax-prep software teams, payroll providers, banks, and agencies need local OCR for taxpayer identity and financial fields with fewer third-party data transfers.
product.simulation_type: Document automation workflow with local OCR and review-gated structured extraction.
product.target_users: CPA firms, tax-prep software vendors, payroll providers, banks, government agencies, and document capture teams.

description: A personal finance co-worker that monitors a local document folder. Put statements, receipts, bills, income records, images, text, JSON, or CSV files in the input folder; it OCRs and organizes the evidence, performs privacy-safe public research where useful, and writes review-only household finance summaries, risks, reminders, and source-grounded reports to the output folder.
name: Personal Financial Advisor

product.agent_role: Actor-style continuous personal finance service with default-LLM specialists and a DockerWorker financial market researcher.
product.benefit: Turns a local finance inbox into source-grounded household finance reports while keeping document review local and isolating public browser research to one DockerWorker actor.
product.customizable_for: Household budgeting, income and expense review, receipt tracking, bill reminders, cash-flow checks, and financial document intake.
product.how_it_works: Continuously watches a local folder, extracts embedded text, uses shared local LLM OCR when needed, lets default-LLM actors classify activity and assess risks, has financial_market_researcher plan DuckDuckGo/w3m public research, then writes a human-review advisor report each scan cycle.
product.input: Local folder with income records, bank statements, receipts, bills, images, text, JSON, and CSV finance files.
product.output: Review-only personal_financial_advisor_report with status, advice, risks, reminders, research sources, source evidence, and Markdown report output.
product.problem: Households, solo operators, and financial coaches need a private continuous service coworker that can watch incoming finance documents, summarize cash-flow status, identify missing or risky items, research public guidance, and prepare human-review advice without moving money or sharing private data.
product.simulation_type: Continuous folder-monitoring service with local OCR and review-gated personal finance advice.
product.target_users: Individuals, households, freelancers, financial coaches, and operations teams reviewing personal finance documents.
